evidence.q1: sections numbered sequentially 1-15, no unresolved cross-references
evidence.q2: 'Personal Data', 'Processing', 'Personal Data Breach' defined once in Section 2 and used consistently
evidence.q3: uses fixed time phrases such as 'within 2 business days', 'within 5 business days', 'within 10 business days', 'at least 30 days' notice', 'once per calendar year'
evidence.q4: no archaic legal diction; uses modern phrasing like 'will process Personal Data only on documented instructions' with no 'hereto', 'whereas', or 'shall'
evidence.q5: all sentences grammatically complete and internally consistent, e.g., 'Vendor will process Personal Data only to provide, secure, support, and improve the services...'
evidence.q6: phrasing register is uniform, e.g., 'Vendor will provide an annual SOC 2 Type II report' or 'Vendor may appoint outside hosting...' matching rest of document
